testcase.name: NAVIGATION TEST SUITE v0.34.0 › should load application and display navigation
NAVIGATION TEST SUITE v0.34.0 › should display all 7 navigation categories
NAVIGATION TEST SUITE v0.34.0 › should show Services category with 4 sub-items
NAVIGATION TEST SUITE v0.34.0 › should display Help category
NAVIGATION TEST SUITE v0.34.0 › should navigate to Dashboard/Home

testcase.name: NAVIGATION TEST SUITE v0.34.0 › should render correctly on desktop (1280x720)
NAVIGATION TEST SUITE v0.34.0 › should render correctly on mobile (375x667)
NAVIGATION TEST SUITE v0.34.0 › should display Manual with correct version 0.35.0 (Phase 40 Fix #1)
NAVIGATION TEST SUITE v0.34.0 › should display Release Notes card on Health page (Phase 40 Fix #2)
NAVIGATION TEST SUITE v0.34.0 › should display Create Schema button in header (Phase 40 Fix #3)
NAVIGATION TEST SUITE v0.34.0 › should output test summary
testcase.system-out:
╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗ ║ COMPREHENSIVE NAVIGATION TEST SUMMARY v0.34.0 ║ ╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
📊 TEST RESULTS ✅ Passed: 4 ❌ Failed: 0 ⊘ Skipped: 0 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Total: 4
📋 NAVIGATION STRUCTURE (v0.34.0) 1. Dashboard 2. Schemas 3. Jobs 4. Rules 5. Logs 6. Services ⭐ (Health, API, Backup, Settings) - NEW 7. Help
🎯 KEY ACHIEVEMENTS ✅ Services consolidated (4 → 1 category) ✅ Navigation simplified (10 → 7 categories) ✅ Help Center integrated ✅ Responsive design verified
📝 DETAILS ✅ Mobile layout responsive ✅ PHASE 40 FIX #1: Manual shows version 0.35.0 (NOT 0.18.0) ✅ PHASE 40 FIX #2: Release Notes card visible on /health page with version 0.35.0 ✅ PHASE 40 FIX #3: Create Schema button visible, enabled, and functional
🔍 VERSION INFO Version: 0.34.0 Phase: 34 (Service Consolidation) Date: 2026-07-14
STATUS: ✅ PASSED ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
